tasks.label: build-frontend
tasks.command: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

tasks.label: build-frontend
tasks.command: cd frontend; npm install; npm run build

tasks.label: build-frontend-verify
tasks.command: cd frontend; npm install; npm run build

cd frontend; "C:\Program Files
odejs
pm.cmd" install; "C:\Program Files

tasks.label: build-frontend-absolute
tasks.command:
cd frontend; & 'C:\Program Files

tasks.label: build-frontend-pathfix
tasks.command: $env:PATH = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs;' + $env:PATH; cd frontend; npm install; npm run build

tasks.label: build-frontend-pathfix2
tasks.command: $env:PATH = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs;' + $env:PATH; cd frontend; npm.cmd install; npm.cmd run build

tasks.label: run-frontend-dev
tasks.command: $env:PATH = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs;' + $env:PATH; cd frontend; npm.cmd run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0
